text: Our SaaS hit $10M ARR with 95% customer retention and 45% year-over-year growth.
feature: Sprint 12 hero typography + IBM Plex Mono

source.prompt: Our SaaS hit $10M ARR with 95% customer retention and 45% year-over-year growth.

args.code: function irregularGridPack(gx,gy,ps){const b=[];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)b.push(new Array(gy).fill(1));const r=[];function tp(x,y,w,h){if(x+w>gx||y+h>gy)return false;for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)if(b[xc][yc]===0)return false;return true;}function oc(x,y,w,h){for(let xc=x;xc<x+w;xc++)for(let yc=y;yc<y+h;yc++)b[xc][yc]=0;}for(const p of ps){const sx=p.sizesArrX||[1],sy=p.sizesArrY||[1];for(let x=0;x<gx;x++)for(let y=0;y<gy;y++){const w=sx[0],h=sy[0];if(tp(x,y,w,h)){oc(x,y,w,h);r.push({x,y,w,h});break;}}}return r;}function drawAtlasIcon(name,cx,cy,size,color){const ctx=drawingContext;const s=size/24;ctx.save();ctx.translate(cx-size/2,cy-size/2);ctx.scale(s,s);ctx.strokeStyle=color;ctx.lineWidth=2/s;ctx.lineCap='round';ctx.lineJoin='round';ctx.fillStyle='none';if(name==='chart-bar'){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(4,20);ctx.lineTo(4,14);ctx.lineTo(8,14);ctx.lineTo(8,20);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(10,20);ctx.lineTo(10,8);ctx.lineTo(14,8);ctx.lineTo(14,20);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(16,20);ctx.lineTo(16,4);ctx.lineTo(20,4);ctx.lineTo(20,20);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(2,20);ctx.lineTo(22,20);ctx.stroke();}else if(name==='users'){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(8,7,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(2,21);ctx.bezierCurveTo(2,17,5,14,8,14);ctx.bezierCurveTo(11,14,14,17,14,21);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(16,7,3,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(14,21);ctx.bezierCurveTo(14,17,17,14,20,14);ctx.bezierCurveTo(23,14,24,17,22,21);ctx.stroke();}else if(name==='arrow-up'){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(12,4);ctx.lineTo(12,20);ctx.stroke();ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(6,10);ctx.lineTo(12,4);ctx.lineTo(18,10);ctx.stroke();}else if(name==='star'){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(12,2);ctx.lineTo(15,9);ctx.lineTo(22,9);ctx.lineTo(16,14);ctx.lineTo(18,21);ctx.lineTo(12,17);ctx.lineTo(6,21);ctx.lineTo(8,14);ctx.lineTo(2,9);ctx.lineTo(9,9);ctx.closePath();ctx.stroke();}ctx.restore();}function setup(){createCanvas(600,360);noLoop();}function draw(){const bg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.bg:[247,244,224];const fg=window.__brandingPalette?window.__brandingPalette.silhouetteColor:[30,27,30];background(bg[0],bg[1],bg[2]);const metrics=[{label:'ARR',value:'$10M',icon:'chart-bar',hero:true},{label:'Retention',value:'95%',icon:'users',hero:false},{label:'YoY Growth',value:'45%',icon:'arrow-up',hero:false},{label:'Rating',value:'★ Top',icon:'star',hero:false}];const pad=14;const heroW=600-pad*2;const heroH=148;const heroX=pad;const heroY=pad;noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(2);rect(heroX,heroY,heroW,heroH,12);const iconCol='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawAtlasIcon('chart-bar',heroX+44,heroY+heroH/2,40,iconCol);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);drawingContext.font='900 72px Inter';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText('$10M',heroX+80,heroY+heroH/2+24);drawingContext.font='500 18px Inter';drawingContext.fillText('Annual Recurring Revenue',heroX+80,heroY+heroH/2+52);const smW=(600-pad*3)/2;const smH=360-heroH-pad*3;const cards=[{label:'Customer Retention',value:'95%',icon:'users',x:pad,y:heroY+heroH+pad},{label:'Year-over-Year Growth',value:'45%',icon:'arrow-up',x:pad*2+smW,y:heroY+heroH+pad}];for(const c of cards){noFill();stroke(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);strokeWeight(1.5);rect(c.x,c.y,smW,smH,10);drawAtlasIcon(c.icon,c.x+36,c.y+smH/2-10,28,iconCol);noStroke();fill(fg[0],fg[1],fg[2]);drawingContext.font='700 42px IBM Plex Mono';drawingContext.textAlign='left';drawingContext.fillStyle='rgb('+fg[0]+','+fg[1]+','+fg[2]+')';drawingContext.fillText(c.value,c.x+66,c.y+smH/2+12);drawingContext.font='400 13px Inter';drawingContext.fillText(c.label,c.x+66,c.y+smH/2+32);}}
